data.title: RED: Add CLI_user and Gate 1a assertions to test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh
data.description:
## TDD Requirement

Modify tests/scripts/test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh to add two new test functions that assert CLAUDE.md documents CLI_user tag awareness and Gate 1a skip behavior. These tests must FAIL (RED) before the CLAUDE.md update in the dependent task runs.

## What to add

In tests/scripts/test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh, add two new test assertions after the existing ones:

1. **test_claude_md_cli_user_tag_documented**: Assert CLAUDE.md mentions 'CLI_user' in the context of the ticket system or bug reporting workflow
   - `assert_contains ... "CLI_user" "$claude_md_content"`

2. **test_claude_md_gate1a_cli_user_skip**: Assert CLAUDE.md documents that Gate 1a / intent-search is skipped for CLI_user-tagged bugs
   - `assert_contains ... "Gate 1a" "$claude_md_content"` (or the relevant phrase from the done definition)

## Files to modify

- tests/scripts/test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] tests/scripts/test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh contains test_claude_md_cli_user_tag_documented function
  Verify: grep -q 'test_claude_md_cli_user_tag_documented\|CLI_user' tests/scripts/test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh contains test_claude_md_gate1a_cli_user_skip assertion
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate 1a\|gate1a' tests/scripts/test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh
- [ ] Both new test functions FAIL before CLAUDE.md is updated (confirming RED state)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py exits 0
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check exits 0
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
